VALID_ROLES = {"admin", "editor", "viewer"}
ALLOWED_STATUSES = {"pending", "confirmed", "shipped"}
REQUIRED_FIELDS = {"name", "price", "sku"}
ELECTRONIC_TYPES = {"phone", "laptop", "tablet"}


def filter_active_users(users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    result = []
    for user in users:
        if user["role"] in VALID_ROLES and user["active"]:
            result.append(user)
    return result


def process_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    processed = []
    for order in orders:
        if order["status"] in ALLOWED_STATUSES:
            processed.append(order)
    return processed


def validate_items(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    valid = []
    for item in items:
        if REQUIRED_FIELDS.issubset(item.keys()):
            valid.append(item)
    return valid


def categorize_products(products: list[dict]) -> dict:
    categories = {}
    for product in products:
        if product["type"] in ELECTRONIC_TYPES:
            categories.setdefault("electronics", []).append(product)
    return categories
